executionAvailability.reason: Production requires requirement_id, but approved recovery uses trace_id or demand_id with demand_version; no safe identity mapping exists.
executionAvailability.recovery: Do not invoke this tool until Provider deploys the approved recovery input contract.

rules: 当前 production 不得调用此 Tool；返回 integration_required，禁止由 trace_id 或 demand_id + demand_version 推导 requirement_id。
只在 Provider 发布批准恢复入参后复制实际成功响应或已验证本地状态中的 ID；不得猜测参数。
